prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis of benzaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The results indicate that the most electrophilic site, susceptible to nucleophilic attack, is atom C3 with an f+ value of 0.39939. The most nucleophilic site, prone to electrophilic attack, is atom O1 with an f- value of 0.23840. The full Fukui indices (f+, f-, f0) and the dual descriptor have been calculated for all 14 atoms. No warnings were reported during the calculation.
